raw_input:
[4.0/5] My hair was too short Was easy to use and some parts curled but my hair was too short for it to actually work. [5.0/5] Curls are Beautiful Amazing product! Love the curls it did in my hair and the simplicity of achieving those curls is a huge bonus! [4.0/5] Not comfortable for me I certainly do like the idea of this non heating hair curler. But as one who often shampoos at night, t does have some holdbacks for me to give it a 5. I did not find it easy to to use, but maybe it's just me. I'm older perhaps than the target buyer, and I also have some shoulder problems that make it harder for me to reach around to the far and back side of my head. It takes a LONG time to dry your hair. Even wearing overnight was not long enough for me. It was not comfortable to sleep in, so I would not do that again either. I find that when I have the time, not going out for a few hours, it works OK if I air dry my hair till still slightly damp, add some voluminzing mousse and let it dry from there, about and hour. On the plus side, this method did give me a lasting and loose curl. So I would use for special occasions more than all the time. May also work for touch up curls between washings. Will try that next. [5.0/5] Heatless curling rods These arrived fast. Packaged well. Just like I’ve seen on Tik Tok. I like how easy they are to use. Appear to be of good quality. I recommend these if you’re looking for some. [5.0/5] Works well These are simple to use
Makes nice curls
Easy to store and great for travel
My wife would recommend these [5.0/5] Easy use, handy accessories and beautiful curls if soft & natural wave long hair There’re 2 headbands, one is flat on top (not round) which make headband easy to stay on head. The clips help to secure the head band so both hands can be free up to twist the hair on to the band. The headband is light. If hair is too straight or too thick, the product may not have good results. The value of product is great, you got 2 sets of headbands and very handy accessories. [5.0/5] It’s very easy to use Ok so this is a must get! Very easy to put on your hair my kids and I have long hair so it takes a lil longer for our hair to curl as it is very long. But it works and it’s comfy and very cute. [3.0/5] Ok, but not great The version that has the flat bit in the middle is preferrable to me for sleeping. The large foam roller one was not comfy or easy to use for me. I did get a decent curl, but honestly I think I just prefer the sock method for sleeping. I think if you showered in the morning and then were able to use this while you were awke and doing chores or reading it would be better. I didn't overly enjoy sleeping with this. [3.0/5] This heatless curling rod made it possible for my hair to curl without any hair damage I always wanted to change my hairstyle to make it curly but was afraid of the damage

it would suffer due to the heat from the electric curler. 

This heatless curling rod made it possible for my hair to curl without any hair damage. 

At first, I was unsure how to use it, but the leaflet given with this product makes

it really easy. It's pretty simple and straightforward. 

Applying this overnight gives beautiful results in the morning. It actually works.

I love the long waves from this hair curler. [5.0/5] Simple and comfy I love having curls in my hair but I hate using heat to achieve the look. I also used to get perms when I was younger but hated how long it took at the salon and the subsequent trips I would have to make a year later.

I have also tried other heatless curlers that usually gave me headaches or unraveled while I slept. Or sometimes the curls didn’t look good.

But not this one. This one was easy to use and took me was less time than the other curlers I have tried. I would towel my hair a bit after a shower, apply some products, and then get to wrapping my hair up around this. Once I got used to using this, I could wrap my hair up in less than 5 minutes and jump into bed immediately after. I didn’t worry about any rollers coming out or may hair coming loose since I was able to secure it well. Using this also made me sleep more on my back, which my neck REALLY appreciated so that was another win in my book.

The curls I got from using this were some of the best I have gotten from any product I have used. My hair feels soft, my curls look natural, and I don’t have to suffer through a headache after using this during the night.

This product produces really nice curls, doesn’t feel heavy, and is easy to use. I love it and highly recommend it. [3.0/5] Not a winner Had high hopes for this but it didn't work for me. I think the barrel itself it too big to really get good results. It was rather uncomfortable and honestly for the time it took to do it I could have just curled my hair. [2.0/5] Did not work at all!! I had high hopes for these as I have had pretty good luck with ither heatless curling items. Sadly these were not one of them. The set is nice as it comes with 2 of them. One is a microfiber and one is a satiny material. They each have 2 scrunched made of the same material. It also has one claw clip and one gator barrette with a plastic carrying bag. I started with about 60% wet, clean hair. I did spray texture spray and use Beachwavers braid balm before wrapping my hair around each side. I had my hair in it for a total of 8.5hrs. I kept them in overnight and all morning while getting ready. I sprayed my hair with hair sprayed and removed it. Once I took them out a majority of my hair was still damp. I tried to scrunched it and do what u could to save some kind of waves. As you can see in the 2nd picture that it really did nothing at all. It was also not the most comfortable thing to sleep in but is doable. Overall I would pick other heatless curling methods over this set. It could be fun to do at sleepovers or for other types of hair but it just did not work for me at all. [3.0/5] Eh It wasn't the greatest thing. It worked, but didn't turn out perfect. Was my first time using it on my daughter who has curly hair that is medium thickness. Pictures are while hair is secured and after. Perhaps there is a learning curve needed that I haven't quite mastered. [4.0/5] Maybe not best for already curly hair I already have reallllly curly wild natural hair, so my hope was that this would help me achieve more of a wavy tamed look. Not sure I got the waves I was hoping for, but I think I achieved somewhere in between wild and wavy. Ha
I tried it on damp hair and slept overnight in it. The wrap itself didn’t interfere with my sleep and has an amazing silky feel. [5.0/5] Perfect This is so easy to use. Make sure you have damp and not super wet hair.
Came with everything you see in the listing.
Soft and comfortable. [3.0/5] I was hoping these would work! I did like the product for the fact it curls without heat but it didn't stay in well and when it was taken out the curls did not stay long because they were not very tight and still damp. I would suggest using a blow drier quickly after you wrap your hair so it adds just a little heart. [2.0/5] Maybe if you already have wavy hair? First, out of the package it smells like petrol. Yuck and not something I want direct on my hair or to sleep in.

I have naturally straight hair that takes volcano heat to curl and stay curled. Every time I curl my hair the damage is instant and extreme so I only do it a few times a year. The grass is always greener, so to speak, and LOVE my hair wavy without the damage so I was hoping this worked as well as Tic Tok said these things should.

It's super funky to get in your hair. I don't have a ton of thick wavy hair for the claw clip to grip onto so it kept slipping out. I did the best I could and got this in my slightgly damp hair and went to bed. It was fairly comfortable to sleep in, but easily worked its way out of the top of my head, so when I awoke the following AM I had a tight spiral of hair at the last 2' of each end and straight until that point.

On me, the only bit that took any type of curl or dent was where I put the rubber bands to hold my hair onto this thing. My hair took zero curl.

Maybe this works for folks that already have hair that curls but didn't give this long straight hair any bounce at all. [5.0/5] Easy to use Sooo easy to use.
The rod itself is nice and soft, and comfortable to sleep in.
It creates nice, soft voluptuous curls that last all day. Can be used on dry hair, or wet hair depending on the type of result you’d like.
Perfect for beginners, or anyone looking for a heat-free way to curl your hair.
Would recommend ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ [5.0/5] Excellent hair tool This was a very easy to use product. We just followed the directions with damp hair and had beautiful curls. My daughter slept in it for school and the curls lasted through the entire day. [1.0/5] Not as expected Too thick add stiff.
The foam is not a good quality and too thick to make the waves last the whole day. I got better results using a pair on knee high socks.

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

Overall, customers have mixed opinions about this heatless hair curling product. Many users love it, praising how easy it is to use, how comfortable it is to sleep in, and the beautiful, natural-looking curls it produces. Several reviewers highlight that it works best on damp hair and that having long hair gives better results. The product is also appreciated for coming with useful accessories like clips and multiple headbands, and for being travel-friendly.

However, a number of customers had less positive experiences. Common complaints include the product not working well for very straight or thick hair, hair not drying fully overnight, and curls not holding. Some found it uncomfortable to sleep in, and a few noted that the barrel size was too large to produce good results. One reviewer mentioned an unpleasant smell straight out of the packaging.

The product seems to work best for people with naturally wavy or moderately thick hair that is at least medium length. Those with very straight, very thick, or very short hair may be disappointed. There also appears to be a learning curve, as some users who struggled at first found better results after adjusting their technique, such as making sure hair is only slightly damp rather than very wet before use.
